topics.title: Invite a user to the organization
topics.summary: Add members to your organization by email from the Members tab.

steps.text: Open the Organization page (sidebar → Organization).
Go to the Members tab.
Click Invite member, enter the email address, and send the invitation.
The invitee will receive a link to join your organization.

topics.title: Create and assign roles
topics.summary: Define roles with capabilities (permissions) and assign them to members.

steps.text: Open Organization → Roles tab.
Create a role with a name and description.
Select the capabilities (permissions) that role should have.
On the Members tab, assign the role to each user, with effective dates if needed.

topics.title: Create an AI agent
topics.summary: Create custom conversational agents from the chat.

steps.text: Open the chat (/chat).
Open the agent picker in the chat header.
Click the + button to create a new agent.
Configure name, model, system prompt, and save.

topics.title: Organization settings
topics.summary: Edit your organization's name, description, logo, and time zone.

steps.text: Open Organization in the sidebar.
On the Settings tab, update the fields you need.
Save your changes.

topics.title: Billing and credits
topics.summary: View your plan, purchase credits, or manage your subscription.

steps.text: Open Organization → Billing tab.
Review your current plan and credit balance.
Use the available actions to buy credits or open the billing portal.

topics.title: Knowledge base (train agents)
topics.summary: Upload documents and train agents with your knowledge.

steps.text: Open Knowledge base in the sidebar.
Create or select a collection and upload documents.
Link the collection to one or more agents and train.

topics.title: Embeddable chat widgets
topics.summary: Publish a chat with an agent on your website via a widget.

steps.text: Open Chat widgets in the sidebar.
Create a widget and choose the agent that will handle it.
Copy the install snippet and paste it into your site.

topics.title: Use the Masscer Assistant
topics.summary: Internal assistant for onboarding and help on how to use Masscer.

steps.text: Open the chat and select Masscer Assistant in the agent picker.
Ask in natural language (e.g. "How do I invite a user?").
The assistant will give you steps and a direct link to the relevant page.
